ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer involved in the transaction */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product sold */,
  "ship_mode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shipping method used */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit from the transaction */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost for the transaction */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the transaction (unit price * quantity + shipping cost) */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue from the transaction (unit price * quantity) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the transaction occurred */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the transaction */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the transaction */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment method used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, canceled, returned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_ship_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_mode_id") REFERENCES ship_modes ("ship_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "customer_since" TEXT /* Date when the customer first made a purchase */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for communication */,
  "marketing_opt_in" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer has opted in for marketing communications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "units_in_stock" INTEGER /* Number of units currently in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "discontinued" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the product is discontinued */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product for shipping calculations */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., length, width, height) */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "short_description" TEXT /* Short description of the product */,
  "long_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ship_modes" (
  "ship_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping method */,
  "ship_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping method */,
  "cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost per unit of the shipping method */,
  "estimated_delivery_days" INTEGER /* Estimated delivery time in days */,
  "minimum_order_value" REAL /* Minimum order value required for this shipping method */,
  "is_express" INTEGER /* Indicates if the shipping method is express */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ship_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact person at the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the supplier */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the supplier */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the supplier */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the supplier */,
  "supplier_since" TEXT /* Date when the supplier started working with the company */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating for the supplier based on performance */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed with the supplier */,
  "is_preferred" INTEGER /* Indicates if the supplier is a preferred supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the region */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code used in the region */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applicable in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* User's position or job title */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date of the last password change */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, view, edit) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., sales report, customer data) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
